_meta.description: Single canonical reference for all HumanTrace signal IDs. Every detector, test fixture, and build session references this file. No signal ID exists outside this registry.

_schema_constraints.output_kind: SIGNAL only — not ACTION, ADVICE, or INSTRUCTIONS
_schema_constraints.rationale: Option A decision locked 2026-03-30. Reflection/guidance output removed entirely. Signal-only output is cleanest for APRA regulatory defensibility.
_schema_constraints.psychological_signals_rule: HT.PSY.* signals MUST NOT be used as primary detectors. Permitted as score amplifiers only, and only when combined with one or more L2 or L3 signals scoring above 0.45. Standalone HT.PSY.* signals cannot produce a risk flag.

_families.INT: Intent Extraction — detects reasoning steered toward harmful or extractive outcomes
_families.TRUST: Trust Hijack — detects illegitimate borrowing of authority or legitimacy
_families.PRESS: Pressure / Urgency — detects forced narrowing of decision space or time compression
_families.AUTH: Authenticity Gap — detects absence of natural human cognitive texture
_families.DIST: Reasoning Distortion — detects manipulative logic patterns
_families.PSY: Psychological — amplifiers only, derived from intent-origin indicators

signals.label: Direct money or payment extraction
signals.description: Message contains explicit request for payment, transfer, or financial action.

signals.label: Credential or identity extraction
signals.description: Message requests login credentials, identity verification, or account access.

signals.label: Personal data extraction
signals.description: Message requests personal or sensitive information beyond what context warrants.

signals.label: Compliance without verification request
signals.description: Message requests action or compliance before any independent verification pathway is offered.

signals.label: Secrecy or isolation request
signals.description: Message instructs recipient to keep communication secret or avoid discussing with others.

signals.label: Authority invocation without grounding
signals.description: Message claims authority (role, rank, institution) without providing verifiable grounding or independent confirmation pathway.

signals.label: Institution impersonation
signals.description: Message claims to originate from a financial institution, government body, or regulatory authority without verifiable markers.

signals.label: Procedural intimidation
signals.description: Message uses procedural or legal language to manufacture compliance pressure without genuine process grounding.

signals.label: Synthetic empathy framing
signals.description: Message uses manufactured empathy or concern to disarm scepticism before an extraction or compliance request.
example_evidence: we are here to help you

signals.label: False legitimacy markers
signals.description: Message uses formatting, reference numbers, or official-sounding language to simulate legitimacy without verifiable substance.

signals.label: Urgency escalation
signals.description: Message creates artificial time pressure to suppress deliberation. Partially implemented in existing L4 pattern_library.

signals.label: Threat of immediate loss
signals.description: Message threatens concrete negative consequence if action is not taken immediately.

signals.label: False deadline
signals.description: Message imposes a specific deadline that cannot be independently verified and serves only to compress decision time.

signals.label: Option narrowing
signals.description: Message presents only one acceptable path forward, eliminating alternatives without justification.
example_evidence: the only way to resolve this

signals.label: Unnatural fluency
signals.description: Message exhibits frictionless, over-optimised language in a context where natural human communication would show hesitation, imprecision, or effort. Primary implementation: humantrace_behavioural_signals.py (micro-variation signal).

signals.label: Absence of bounded uncertainty
signals.description: Message shows zero hedging or uncertainty where authentic human reasoning would acknowledge limits. Primary implementation: humantrace_behavioural_signals.py (limbic leakage signal — inverse).

signals.label: Investment asymmetry
signals.description: Emotional weight or urgency expressed is disproportionate to the actual size or nature of the request. Primary implementation: humantrace_behavioural_signals.py (investment asymmetry signal).

signals.label: Low lived specificity
signals.description: Message lacks the concrete personal detail, named reference, or contextual anchoring that genuine human communication in this context would naturally contain.

signals.label: False dilemma
signals.description: Message presents a binary choice that eliminates valid alternatives, forcing the recipient into a constructed either/or decision.

signals.label: Circular legitimacy
signals.description: Message justifies its own authority or legitimacy by reference to itself or to unverifiable claims, creating a closed reasoning loop.
example_evidence: trust us because this is official
this is legitimate because we say so

signals.label: Fear override
signals.description: Message uses fear of consequence to bypass rational evaluation, substituting emotional pressure for reasoned justification.

signals.label: Post-hoc justification structure
signals.description: Message reaches its conclusion first and constructs supporting reasoning afterward. Detectable as conclusion-first structure with selectively assembled evidence.

signals.label: Contradiction masking
signals.description: Message contains conflicting statements that are presented without acknowledgment or reconciliation.

signals.label: Absence of harm acknowledgment
signals.description: AMPLIFIER ONLY. Message shows no acknowledgment of harm, risk, or negative impact on the recipient. Must not be used as primary detector. Boosts overall score only when combined with HT.INT.* or HT.PRESS.* signals above 0.45.

signals.label: Instrumental treatment of recipient
signals.description: AMPLIFIER ONLY. Message treats the recipient as a means to an end with no recognition of their autonomy or right to decline. Must not be used as primary detector.

signals.label: Rapid alignment mimicry
signals.description: AMPLIFIER ONLY. Message exhibits rapid mirroring of recipient tone, values, or stated preferences to manufacture false rapport. Must not be used as primary detector.

_composite_patterns.description: Named composite patterns triggered when multiple signal families fire together. Composite patterns amplify overall risk score.

patterns.label: AI Fraud Signature
patterns.description: High authenticity gap combined with urgency pressure and extraction intent. Consistent with AI-assisted fraud generation.

patterns.label: Human Manipulator
patterns.description: Trust hijack with synthetic empathy and escalating pressure. Consistent with skilled human social engineering.

patterns.label: Institutional Malice
patterns.description: Reasoning distortion combined with extraction intent and instrumental framing. Consistent with system-driven unethical behaviour.

_fusion_weights.note: Starting weights only. To be recalibrated against corpus once Phase 2 corpus is built.
_fusion_weights.auth_gap_cap: Authenticity Gap (AUTH) family cannot contribute more than 0.10 to overall score independently. It is a texture signal, not a primary risk signal.
_fusion_weights.psy_amplifier_cap: PSY signals cannot contribute more than 0.05 to overall score and only when gated by L2/L3 signals above 0.45.

_risk_thresholds.clamp: Score is clamped at 1.0 after all boosts are applied.

_negative_features.description: Features that reduce risk score. Present when message shows characteristics of legitimate communication.
features: Concrete verifiable grounding (names, reference numbers checkable externally)
Balanced acknowledgment of risk or uncertainty
Process explanation that matches known legitimate institutional behaviour

_build_sequence.step_0: This file. Signal registry created and locked before any detector code.
_build_sequence.step_1: Intent Extraction detector — HT.INT.EXT.01 through HT.INT.EXT.05
_build_sequence.step_2: Trust Hijack detector — HT.TRUST.AUTH.01 through HT.TRUST.AUTH.05
_build_sequence.step_3: Pressure / Urgency detector — HT.PRESS.URG.01 through HT.PRESS.URG.04
_build_sequence.step_4: Reasoning Distortion detector — HT.DIST.01 through HT.DIST.05
_build_sequence.step_5: Authenticity Gap wiring — connect existing behavioural_signals.py to HT.AUTH.GAP.01 through HT.AUTH.GAP.04
_build_sequence.step_6: Fusion layer redesign — new weights, interaction boosts, composite pattern matching
_build_sequence.step_7: Psychological amplifiers — HT.PSY.* as score modifiers only, post-pilot
